title: Two people saw a multicolor UFO in Olinda-PE [1999]
excerpt: FEB 18th, 1999. Time: 00h30, Duration: 10 minutes. In Rio Doce region, in Olinda, State of Pernambuco, two unidentified flying objects were spotted by two people in a clear sky night. text_preview:
FEB 18th, 1999. Time: 00h30, Duration: 10 minutes. In Rio Doce region, in Olinda, State of Pernambuco, two unidentified flying objects were spotted by two people in a clear sky night. According to the observers, the UFO was large and shaped like a multicolored spotlight, like a prism. The flying object flew at slow speed and moved in a straight line towards the East.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.539. “Questionário sobre a ocorrência de objeto voador não i
summary: Two people in Rio Doce, Olinda-PE watched two large multicolored prism-like UFOs fly slowly eastward for 10 minutes on a clear night.
